title: The Four Step Process to Loop Engineer ANYTHING (+ Why Prompt Engineering Isn't Dead)
summary: Chase AI argues that prompt engineering remains relevant despite claims of its demise, and explains what loop engineering is and how to design loops. The video presents a contrarian take on the current state of prompt engineering versus emerging loop engineering approaches.
writeup: Chase AI lays out a four step process for what the channel calls loop engineering and defines the concept along with how to design loops. The video makes a contrarian case that prompt engineering is not obsolete, countering claims of its demise. Takeaways: prompt engineering remains relevant, and loop engineering is presented as an emerging approach to building structured, repeatable workflows.
